---
title: "Midterm DaAn"
author: "Ryan Bean"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
remove(list = ls())

library(tidyverse)
library(tidycensus)
library(fredr)
library(lubridate)
library(readxl)
library(readr)
library(janitor)
library(tsibble)
library(fpp3)
```

```{r}
fredr_set_key("523a2b98a1ce120186357fd0c916cc26")
```

```{r}
years <- c(2005:2019, 2021:2024)

homeownership <- map_dfr(
  years,
  \(yr) {
    get_acs(
      geography = "state",
      variables = c(
        total_occupied = "B25003_001",
        owner_occupied = "B25003_002"
      ),
      year = yr,
      survey = "acs1"
    ) %>%
      select(NAME, variable, estimate) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = variable, values_from = estimate) %>%
      mutate(
        year = yr,
        homeownership_rate = 100 * owner_occupied / total_occupied
      ) %>%
      transmute(
        state = NAME,
        year,
        homeownership_rate
      )
  }
)

income_list <- map(
  years,
  ~ get_acs(
      geography = "state",
      variables = "B19013_001",
      year = .x,
      survey = "acs1"
    ) %>%
      transmute(
        state = NAME,
        year = .x,
        median_income = estimate
      )
)

income <- bind_rows(income_list)

population_list <- map(
  years,
  ~ get_acs(
      geography = "state",
      variables = "B01003_001",
      year = .x,
      survey = "acs1"
    ) %>%
      transmute(
        state = NAME,
        year = .x,
        population = estimate
      )
)

population <- bind_rows(population_list)

mortgage_raw <- fredr(
  series_id = "MORTGAGE30US",
  observation_start = as.Date("2005-01-01")
)

mortgage_annual <- mortgage_raw %>%
  mutate(year = year(date)) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    mortgage_rate = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
fhfa_raw <- read_csv("/Users/user/BostonCollege/hpi_at_state (1).csv", col_names=FALSE) %>%
  setNames(c("state", "year", "quarter", "hpi"))
names(fhfa_raw)
```

```{r}
fhfa_annual <- fhfa_raw %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  filter(year >= 2005) %>%
  group_by(state, year) %>%
  summarise(
    hpi = mean(hpi, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

fhfa_annual <- fhfa_annual %>%
  mutate(state = state.name[match(state, state.abb)])
```

```{r}
bls_data <- read_delim("/Users/user/BostonCollege/la.data.2.AllStatesU.txt", delim = "\t") %>%
  clean_names()

bls_series <- read_delim("/Users/user/BostonCollege/la.series.txt", delim = "\t") %>%
  clean_names()

bls_area <- read_delim("/Users/user/BostonCollege/la.area", delim = "\t") %>%
  clean_names()

# Join the actual data to the series metadata
bls_merged <- bls_data %>%
  left_join(bls_series, by = "series_id")

# Usually the common key is area_code
bls_merged <- bls_merged %>%
  left_join(
    bls_area %>% select(area_code, area_text),
    by = "area_code"
  )

# Keep annual-average unemployment rate
state_unemployment <- bls_merged %>%
  filter(period == "M13") %>%          # annual average
  filter(measure_code == "03") %>%     # unemployment rate
  transmute(
    state = area_text,
    year = as.integer(year),
    unemployment_rate = as.numeric(value)
  ) %>%
  filter(state %in% c(state.name, "District of Columbia")) %>%
  arrange(state, year)

state_unemployment
```

```{r}
panel_data <- homeownership %>%
  left_join(income, by = c("state", "year")) %>%
  left_join(population, by = c("state", "year")) %>%
  left_join(fhfa_annual, by = c("state", "year")) %>%
  left_join(state_unemployment, by = c("state", "year")) %>%
  left_join(mortgage_annual, by = "year") %>%
  arrange(state, year)

panel_data %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ sum(is.na(.))))
```

```{r}
panel_ts <- panel_data %>%
  as_tsibble(key = state, index = year)
```
